response.justification: Strong senior generalist with relevant geospatial/GIS domain experience through GISCollective and Green Map work, but the C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments around a decade ago, and there is no Rust experience. The bulk of recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang rather than the systems-level C++ stack this role centers on. Worth a screening call to probe depth of low-latency systems work (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic) and willingness to ramp on modern C++, but not a clear technical match.
strengths: Direct geospatial/navigation domain experience (GISCollective, Green Map, GIS web apps)
Low-latency, high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (async I/O, fibers, caching)
Senior craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, Linux, distributed services
concerns: Minimal modern C++ experience (~6 months at NI in 2014–2015) and no Rust
Recent years focused on TypeScript/Node.js product work, not systems programming
No evidence of production routing/tiling pipelines or large-scale map data processing
